name: app-hunt
description: Discover the best hidden gems in the Android ecosystem. A community-driven app discovery experience.

scripts.prepublish:public:
echo "
[CHECKLIST] Before publishing publicly, ensure you have:
1. Updated README.md with latest features
2. Reviewed PRIVACY.md and TERMS.md for compliance
3. Committed all changes to Git
4. Verified the build passes validation
"
scripts.upload: npm run bundle && node ../../scripts/validate-build.js && devvit upload
scripts.publish:public: npm run prepublish:public && npm run bundle && node ../../scripts/validate-build.js && devvit publish --public
